title: Multiple low-complexity AutoLaunchedFlows running on high-volume Case object
snippet: 4 active AutoLaunchedFlow(s) on the Case object. Avg element count: 5 (LOW complexity). 300 Case records processed in last 90 days (3.3/day). Flow activity score: 2.128 (threshold: 0.6).

title: Elevated case owner reassignment rate detected
snippet: 480 owner changes recorded across 300 Cases in the last 90 days. Avg 1.6 owner changes per Case (threshold: 1.5). Top categories: Technical Issue (avg 4.0/case), Billing Inquiry (avg 3.8/case), Account Management (avg 3.5/case).

title: Approval records exceeding SLA due to high delay in 'Discount Approval'
snippet: 60 pending 'Discount Approval' records with average delay of 5.0 days (threshold: 3.0 days). Bottleneck score: 30.0 (threshold: 10). 2 approver(s) handling all pending items.

title: Significant knowledge gap in Case resolution — low KB article linkage
snippet: 30 of 60 closed Cases in the last 90 days have a linked Knowledge Article. Knowledge gap score: 0.5 (threshold: 0.4). 50.0% of Cases closed with KB reuse — 30 resolved without KB linkage.

title: Multiple Flows referencing the same Named Credential 'ServiceNow Integration'
snippet: 3 active Flow(s) reference the 'ServiceNow Integration' Named Credential (threshold: 3 distinct flows). Match type: name. Referencing flow IDs: 301xx000001ABC2, 301xx000001ABC3, 301xx000001ABC4.

title: Approval queue overloaded with limited approver capacity in 'Discount Approval'
